title: Homosexuals' Right to Adopt: Why should it be legalized?
text: But, who has the privilege to choose their parents? Besides, there are plenty of professional studies that show no indications that children of homosexual parents are feeling worse psychologically than children with heterosexual parents

title: Homosexuals' Right to Adopt: Why should it be legalized?
text: Nevertheless, I do realize that there is a risk of teasing, but to use that argument against homosexuals' right to adopt is to give the victory to the bigots who would tease

title: Homosexuals' Right to Adopt: Why should it be legalized?
text: Using that argument, we might as well claim that we should not allow immigrants in Sweden, since there is a risk of teasing

title: Homosexuals' Right to Adopt: Why should it be legalized?
text: However, there is one strong argument against homosexuals' right to adopt

title: Homosexuals' Right to Adopt: Why should it be legalized?
text: That is the risk that some countries will not give out children for adoption to Sweden if the law is passed

title: Homosexuals' Right to Adopt: Why should it be legalized?
text: This is, indeed, a great problem

title: Homosexuals' Right to Adopt: Why should it be legalized?
text: Most Asian countries, for instance, are strongly religious and will not accept such a law

title: Homosexuals' Right to Adopt: Why should it be legalized?
text: Despite this, I do not think that it is a strong enough argument to stop the liberal progress in which Sweden might take the lead

title: Homosexuals' Right to Adopt: Why should it be legalized?
text: If we can state a good example, others might follow, even though I realize that religious convictions are hard to sway

title: Homosexuals' Right to Adopt: Why should it be legalized?
text: Whatever the counter-arguments, to me it seems perfectly obvious: There are too many children suffering in the world, too many who are in need of a home and people who love them

title: Homosexuals' Right to Adopt: Why should it be legalized?
text: There are enough suffering children for all of us, and, put it in that perspective, does it not seem pathetic to argue about whether homosexuals are fit as parents or not? Who can honestly say that they believe that the starving five-year-old living in the sewer of Budapest would be better off staying there than living in Sweden with loving adults, male of female in whatever combination? It is a question of human rights, it is for the sake of the children of the world - that is why it should be legal for homosexual couples to adopt

title: Homosexuals' Right to Adopt: Why should it be legalized?
text: (The articles are from the UNT's debate section, week 7 2001

title: Homosexuals' Right to Adopt: Why should it be legalized?

Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: No actions should be taken by the EU against Austria for electing populist Jörg Haider and his Freedom Party to a position of power - at least not until it can be established that Haider really is a dangerous man and a threat to democracy

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: This is the bottom line of an article by political journalist Gunvor Hildén, published in Upsala Nya Tidning in February

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: In my opinion, thinking like Hildén - "let us wait and see" - is the worst possible thing to do when facing a situation like the recent one in Austria

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: In this essay I will explain why I think Hildén is wrong and why it is not just the duty of the EU, but the duty of every EU citizen, to protest when right-wing extremists somehow find themselves at reach of actual power

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: This regardless if the extremists are considered dangerous or not

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: Jörg Haider of the Austrian Freedom Party has on several occasions, even in public speeches, expressed an aversion to immigrants

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: It is hardly news to anyone that he is popular in extremist circles

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: The fact that he recently has apologised for some of his earlier, more extreme attacks, can be a sign, claims Gunvor Hildén, that Haider is actually not a racist but "merely" a populist saying what people want to hear

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: But irrespective of which motives Haider may have for expressing these opinions, the point must not be forgotten: by letting these opinions out in the open Haider gives support to all right-wing extremists, which, of course, can not be tolerated by the EU

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: It is absolutely essential that the EU shows the rest of Europe, and the rest of the world, that right-wing extremism will not be tolerated

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: Being passive, like Hildén suggests in her article, and waiting until Haider reveals his "true self", will most likely send a strange message to other extremist parties: a message saying that it is possible to be a successful politician and a racist at the same time - as long as you do not give the impression of being dangerous

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: It is a well-known fact that in Europé alone there is at least a handful of parties similar to the Freedom Party in Austria

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: If Haider can make it all the way to the top and stay there, without the rest of the world protesting, why wouldn't these parties be able to do the same thing? All European countries must therefore, in every possible way, make things difficult for the right-wing extremists

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: They must do this not only for the purpose of showing other extremist parties that they will not be accepted, but also for the purpose of reminding everybody else of the existence of these parties and how they have affected the history of Europe

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: Nobody living today is unaware of the incomprehensible tragedy that took place in Europe during the 1930s and 40s, in the name of extreme nationalism

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: However, reminding people of the characteristics of right-wing extremism is more important today than ever before

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: In my opinion, this is one of the most important roles of the European Union

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: That is why I find it so surprising that Gunvor Hildén thinks that the EU should lie low, bide its time, wait and see, in the case with Jörg Haider

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: If the EU does not react to foul play like his racist utterances, the EU neglects its role of reminding people

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: To support her opinion, Hildén claims that since the election of Jörg Haider was a democratic process, no outside party has got the right to interfere with it

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: But with democracy comes also the right to object, to protest and to interfere

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: So, even if electing Haider was democratically and politically inviolable, every individual has the right, or even the duty, to object to that election, no matter which policy the EU chooses to follow in the future

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: Gunvor Hildén asks herself and the readers a question: How dangerous is Jörg Haider? This is also the headline of her article

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
text: I am puzzled by the fact that she asks this question, and, instead of answering it, as a conclusion I would like to ask a counter-question: Who can be more dangerous than a man with power, with access to the public's ear and a habit of giving his support to thousands of fascists and neo-nazis, even though only through "innocent" empty populist phrases? The EU must not hesitate in this case - do not let Haider show how dangerous he might or might not be

title: Dangerous or not - Haider must not be ignored by the EU
Why not reduce the working hours?!
text: Would it not be nice to only work six hours a day instead of eight, 30 hours per week instead of 40? That would leave us ten hours more spare time to spend in what way we choose

title: Why not reduce the working hours?!
text: In my opinion a reduction in working hours is a great idea, and I am therefore convinced to try to meet four of the arguments made against this, mainly those coming from the Swedish Konjunkturutskottet (the institution of business activity)

title: Why not reduce the working hours?!
text: I have found them presented in an article in Aftonbladet the 16th of February 2000

title: Why not reduce the working hours?!
text: The first issue to solve is the reduction of the income when it does not increase as much as before

title: Why not reduce the working hours?!
text: I do not see how it necessarily has to be so but if it does, it is not automatically a bad thing

title: Why not reduce the working hours?!
text: If prices do not increase, the money that you earn will have the same value and so the wages do not have to be increased

title: Why not reduce the working hours?!
text: It is the business cycle that has to spin in the right direction

title: Why not reduce the working hours?!
text: If we look at Sweden's position in an international perspective, it is a good thing that the wages do not increase too much

title: Why not reduce the working hours?!
text: At the moment the wages are high in Sweden compared to many other countries, and if we want to be among those who attract international companies, we can not have too high a wages

title: Why not reduce the working hours?!
text: The same goes for keeping our Swedish companies in Sweden

title: Why not reduce the working hours?!

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: Recently there has been a debate about whether or not old Nazis should be located and put on trial

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: This is a very important issue and one which affects a lot of people since the crimes committed by the Nazis during the Second World War are probably the worst in the history of mankind

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: Some countries have even appointed special committees that work with locating these old Nazis

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: In an article in DN (6/2 2000) Anders Rosell and Claudio Marcello Tamburrini argue that there is no valid argument to do this

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: In this discussion I am going to argue against that article and present a few arguments in favour of bringing old Nazis to court

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: One common argument why you should not bother with punishing these old Nazis is that they are so old and it serves no purpose to punish them

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: Rosell and Tamburrini claim in their article that the persons who committed these terrible crimes have changed over the years and should not be punished for mistakes that they made in their youth under the influence of a crazy political project

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: To call the killing of a lot of people for a mistake is a bit of an understatement

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: The fact is that they have deliberately killed a lot of innocent people and like any other criminal they should be held responsible for their actions

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: It really should not matter whether the person in question has been able to hide from the law for fifty years and that he might now be very old

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: He is still the same person who he was fifty years ago even if he has changed his beliefs

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: The problem with these people and their age is what kind of punishment they should get? Obviously it is very hard to decide but in some way it should be done

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: Putting them in prison is probably not a good solution since they are so old and not a threat to society any more

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: Perhaps it is not what kind of punishment they get that is central, but the fact that they are being punished that is important

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: It shows that the crimes were so horrible that they cannot be ignored even though many years have passed

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: It will remind everyone of the terrible crimes that were committed and have an intimidating effect on young potential Nazis

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: This is very important since many of those who join Nazi groups today do not know what really happened during the Second World War, and if bringing these old Nazis to justice helps to educate them and to create a detestation of these crimes it is of great importance

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: In our society of today a lot of people are joining groups with Nazi ideologies

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: This is a very serious problem

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: Punishing these old Nazis can act as an example showing that this kind of behaviour is not acceptable

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: Of course there is no guarantee that this will lead to a decrease of Nazi related violence but there is a good chance that it will prevent those who are about to join one of these groups from doing it

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: Those who already are devoted Nazis probably will not be affected that much because as Rosell and Tamburrini point out in their article, criminals who have strong ideological beliefs are harder to dishearten

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: Nevertheless if you can prevent these groups from getting new members it is worth it

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: In conclusion you can say that the killing that took place during WW2 is something horrible and something that affects us all

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: The holocaust is something that touches us deeply

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: Even though the persons who committed the crimes may have become better people and realised that what they did was something terrible, the actual deed has not lost any significance over the years

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: The main thing is that if you commit a crime you should be punished, and what crime is more serious than the killing another man? There is obviously a problem when the offence took place such a long time ago, but when you consider the seriousness of the matter you cannot let it pass

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: The period for prosecution should never expire

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: Summary: In an article in DN (6/2 2000) Anders Rosell, and Claudio Marcello Tamburrini claim that it is absurd to track down old Nazis and punish them

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: They believe that the punishing of these eighty-year-olds will not have any intimidating effect on young Nazis, instead they will look at them as martyrs

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: Furthermore Rosell and Tamburrini argue that these crimes were committed such a long time ago and that the criminals today are totally different persons and should not be punished for old sins

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis
text: The real reason for wanting to punish these old Nazis is according to Rosell and Tamburrini a need for revenge

title: Right To Prosecute Old Nazis

Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: Currently there is a vivid debate going on about wether a shortening of working hours from 40 to 35 hours a week should become law or not

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: The arguments, presented in the article, against the proposition are mainly economic ones, for instance the need for pay cuts corresponding to the decrease, while the arguments for the proposition to a greater extent deals with how we will gain quality of life

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: In this essay I claim that a law is necessary and to support this I will point to the fact that the arguments for it are important aspects we cannot ignore when it comes to every person's well being

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: To start with the economic argument, I would like to state that this law would not necessarily have to lead to great cuts in the state activity or pay cuts for the employees

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: I realise that the reform in question will cost a lot, but I claim that there are other ways to finance it

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: After having read a debate article in DN2, I realise that this is evidently a question of priority for the state

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: The authors of this article claim that the money needed could and should be taken directly from the state budget

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: Today, after a long time of budget deficit, the budget is balanced, and furthermore, the excess is increasing

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: Accordingly, it is possible to use this excess and I agree completely with the authors' thesis that we ought to seize this opportunity to improve working-conditions when we can afford it

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: One could say that this reform would be very expensive for the state, but, undoubtedly, the prize is worth paying

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: This is exactly the conclusion drawn by the committee that was assigned by the government to investigate advantages and disadvantages of the reform

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: 3 It is, however, probable that the increased amount of sparetime and richer quality of life, to which the law would lead and which I will comment on later, would stimulate the purchasing power in general and thus the money would return to the state

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: Before I turn to look at that, however, I will focus on another argument for a shorter working week; that is, the statement that the unemployment rate would decrease, allowing us to look with revived hope towards the goal to have full ockupation for everybody

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: France, the first nation in the European Union to legislate for a 35-hour working week, is an excellent example of how this has turned out successful

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: During the last couple of years, the unemployment rate in France indeed has decreased

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: The reasons for this, however, can be discussed

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: Critics argue that the diminishing number of unemployed in France is more likely due to other factors, such as prosperous times

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: 4 Here in Sweden it is also argued that a shortening of working hours would result in increased unemployment at long sight because it acts like a check on the economic growth

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: Nevertheless, no matter how uncertain the outcome is, I claim that it is worth trying, especially considering the positive effects a reform would have

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: Lastly, let us look at my main argument, which is that working 35 hours a week will improve our quality of life

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: A decrease in working-hours would make it easier to cope with the day, especially in physically or psychologically demanding jobs

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: It would also provide more time for recreation and allow us to go back to work with a larger energy supply the next morning

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: In addition, the effect of this would be that fewer persons reported themselves sick and we would have less early retirements

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: Related to this are of course less work-related illnesses and a better health in general

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: According to a report from Miljöpartiet5, these positive effects have been shown when the idea of a shorter working week has been tried out

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: Likewise, more spare time equals life quality as it means more time with our children, and more time to develop interesting hobbies, which definitely makes us more harmonious and content with life

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: Our creativity is developed; something the whole society benefits from

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: In short, this debate focuses on the choice between good economy, on the one hand, and a better quality of life, on the other hand

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: I think we all know which aspect is the most important in politics, and accordingly, I don't think a legalisation of a shorter working week is likely to take place at the moment

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: But why should economy precede health? Our health and well being is important factors not only for individuals but also for our society in general, regarding early retirements and, simply, the ability to cope with, and enjoy, our jobs and lives

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: As far as I am concerned, the good effects of the reform in question have not been given enough significance - we would profit from a 5-hour reduction of the working week

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: Summary of "Kortad arbetstid skadar staten" In this article, the head of the state employers' association claims that a law advocating a reduction of working hours from 40 to 35 hours a week would threaten Swedish economy and welfare

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: She states that there are two alternative, both negative, effects of this law

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: Either it would cause great cuts in state activity, such as education, research and police forces, resulting in an increasing load for employees, among other problems, or it would become necessary to cut their wages corresponding to the decrease in working-hours

title: Society benefits from decrease in working hours
text: This would mean a 12,5 percent deduction of their salaries, something that is not believed to be accepted without problems

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: All people have a right to an opinion of their own and I will not argue against that in this essay

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: The text I have chosen to argue against expresses a strong religious feeling and I will not argue against this either

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: I will, however, point out some of the weaknesses in Warnecki's text, not because I do not approve of his religion, but because I do not think his arguments are valid

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: I will not question his Biblical sources, but instead, I will base my arguments on fundamental logic

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: Warnecki's religion is Christianity, which is why I have chosen to spell god with a capital g throughout most of my essay

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: It would not be fair to say that Warnecki is completely wrong in his statement that people are trained to think in a certain way when they are educated

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: Where Warnecki goes wrong is when he states that education drills you "to think like a soldier of darkness

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: " This, according to Warnecki, means that you question everything about religion and focus your attention on your own selfish desires, eventually leading to opposition

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: Warnecki is a bit vague on this point, but my assumption is that he means opposition to God

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: My belief is that education makes people question life, but not because they are evil or have selfish goals

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: There are people who question life due to selfish goals or because they have evil doings in mind

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: However, the main population - of those who can - try to help themselves understand their own life and thus try to improve their lives

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: I feel that a greater understanding of one's life usually leads to an overall intensified happiness and contentment in life

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: Happiness cannot be bought, it comes from within and I am a strong believer of finding out more about things I do not know much about

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: This helps me to determine the way that I really feel about specific issues

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: Yes, this means that I oppose some people's opinions and I might even go against God's will

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: As long as I can justify my belief with a stronger argument than: "it does not say so in the Bible," I do not think other people and God should condemn me, although they do and will continue to do so

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: If there is a god I am sure that he would like us to treat others the way we would like others to treat us

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: To me, this means that I will respect other people's beliefs although I might not agree with their views

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: To respect other people for having different beliefs and codes of behaviour is difficult when you do not understand why they behave differently from you

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: Understanding comes with knowledge and knowledge comes with education

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: This is why I believe education is a gift from God and not Satan's attempt to lead humankind into hell

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: When accepting Warnecki's theory, the assumption that Warnecki's truth is the truth must also be accepted

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: Warnecki states in his text that God is the only being who knows how to attain full perfection

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: Does Warnecki not breach his own rule of not concentrating on yourself by stating that his truth or view on mankind is the only true view? If you have an understanding of others, you will most probably also have an acceptance of their beliefs and thus not treat them with disrespect

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: This is where I think Warnecki loses his grip on the educated audience, probably because educated people are, as he so correctly points out, taught to question the logic in a person's reasoning

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: Warnecki is very clear on God being the only being that is self-autonomous

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: What I cannot understand is how Warnecki then can tell us to seek Jesus on our own but at the same time state that people who work to make our world a better place are performing the proud work of Satan

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: Is he not doing what he accuses the educated person of doing? He is stating that his self is more superior than others' and that his way is the only correct one

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: Is he not trying to teach us something? I believe he is and he is thus not living what he preaches

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: To my knowledge there is no way for mankind to live the life Warnecki preaches

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: There will always be something for a person to disagree with or new places or persons to encounter

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: To be able to solve the problems of everyday life, an education is needed

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: This education does not have to be the universal truth of the western world, but it involves an understanding of differences

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: This is why I can respect Warnecki for having his beliefs although I cannot for one second agree with him

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell? By Michael Warnecki Warnecki's thesis is based on the assumption that education is evil and that it originates from Satan

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: The reason for education being evil is that education makes scholars aware of the self

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: Children are taught to decide what to do in this world, but according to Warnecki, only God is allowed to change the world in which we live

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: Warnecki further argues that only God is self-autonomous

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: If people choose to pursue the road of self, they are bound to a life in sin

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
text: This life is further burdened with education since education teaches you to adhere to what you think and what you feel is right or wrong, but only God can decide what is right and what is wrong

title: College - Preparing You For a Future in Hell?
POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Trônet thinks that politicians ought to lose their power in the vestries, because otherwise they will use religion for their own purposes

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: He thinks that politicians have nothing to do in church, because God founded the church and his words must rule there

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: It is God's church and not the people's

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: The church can never obey the same democratic rules as the rest of society

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: With this he says that we are not free to arrange the church as we like, there is already an ancient, fixed role for the church

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: People would thereby be powerless when it comes to changing something in the church

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: I think that is wrong - the church can, and should, change

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Trônet expresses fear that the politician-led church will turn into a means of manipulating people

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Politicians will also secularise the church even more

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: The problem with his reasoning is the fact that present-day Sweden already is secularised

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: How are politicians going to use the church to manipulate, when no one cares about the church? Religion is no longer powerful enough to be a means of manipulation in Sweden

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Trônet asserts that politicians have weakened the church, but he does not ask why or how it could happen

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Secularisation was inevitable when political awareness grew, because people realised how suppressive the old church was

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Trônet refuses to see this

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: He thinks that if only politics had left church alone, Sweden would not be as secularised as it is today

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: I think secularisation is inevitable, due to the conservative views that the church still has

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: That would certainly not change if politicians lost their power in the vestries

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Trônet may be reluctant to allow any political influence in the church, but he proves to be even more conservative when he claims that the church was founded by God

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Leaving the question of God's existence unanswered; there are still illogical lapses in Trônet's reasoning

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: He argues that "it is God's will that must be valid in church, not ours [people's]"

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: The interpretation of the Bible is obviously a difficult task, as we have learnt from the various interpretations so far

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Some people have even interpreted some parts as an excuse for murdering

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: I argue that the church is not God's church - and should not be

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: It was built by people, the Bible was written by people - even if God told them what to write and how to build

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: People have interpreted, changed, and added their own opinions and views to what might have been God's words from the beginning

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Therefore, when Trônet reads the Bible, he reads words written by people, whose motives he does not know

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: God's words are simply not reliable enough to follow

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Therefore, elected politicians must have influence over how the church is led

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Trônet argues that the Bible and the church should not have to undergo the same kind of political scrutiny, democratisation and modernisation as the rest of society

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: It is sacred

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Trônet refers in his article to the democratic society as "the foreign ideology" and "the worldly power in the disguise of democratic party establishment"

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Against "the foreign ideology" he puts "ordinary Christian faith and church order", which we then must suppose is undemocratic

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: It may not be that he wants the message of the church to be undemocratic, as it would be against Jesus' words to deny anyone salvation

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: But he obviously wants the leadership of the church to be hierarchical, traditional, and undemocratic

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: I think that anyone who prefers an undemocratic order to a democratic one should be doubted and questioned

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Trônet argues that the church should be an institution free from political power

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: To him, politically elected vestries are a threat to the Christian doctrine

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: He does not realise that the church has always been the battleground for ideological fights, and that the church also has been political

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: People have used the church to get worldly power in all times

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: The church would not be free from dogma or manipulation just because the politicians were done away with

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: The difference is just that now, they are elected

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: He argues that democracy is wrong for the church, but fails to see that there is no such thing as "ordinary Christian faith and order"

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: The order and the role of the church can change, if people want it to change

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: God did not set up the rules

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Trônet also blames politicians for the secularisation of Sweden

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: He does not admit that political awareness made people question the dogma of the church, and that is why people turn away from religion

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: To complain about secularisation and reject people's influence over the church shows that he is both illogical and conservative

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Summary of the article The article that I am going to argue against has the title "It is a sin that politicians have replaced God in the Swedish church"

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: The author is Sverker Trônet, a priest from Nynäshamn and chairman of the "Organisation for Christian unity"

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: The state and the church have recently been separated in Sweden

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: There is, however, still locally elected vestries (kyrkofullmäktige) in every parish

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: The vestry makes decisions and employs priests

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Everyone over 18 has the right to vote in church elections, which are held separately from general elections

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Trônet argues that now that the church is separated from the state, there is no reason to have politicians making decisions about the church

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: The state has always suppressed the church, and rearranged Christianity to suit political aims

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: The Christian doctrine must be practised, and politicians cannot do that

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Instead, they have changed the original Christian faith, and created a "people's church", governed by democratic laws

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Trônet wants to return to the Episcopal order that the Swedish church had before 1982

title: POLITICAL INFLUENCE IS NECESSARY IN THE SWEDISH CHURCH
text: Episcopal order means that the bishops and the chapter (domkapitlet) lead the church and employ the priests

Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: There has been a great progress in the science of molecular biology during the late 20th century that has brought us closer to the secret of life

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: The most important question today is if this is a desired development and we should let it continue without hindrance or if we need to slow down the pace or perhaps even stop it

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: Torbjörn Tännsjö argues that there are no convincing arguments for why we should do anything to stop the progress while I am of the opposite opinion

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: In this essay I shall present three objections to Tännsjö's article, starting with criticism of the main assumption for his whole reasoning

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: The main assumption for Tännsjö's discussion is that there must be something wrong with the biological nature of the human being

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: He has drawn this conclusion after considering all the malice that man has made himself guilty of during the last century

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: But there can not be something generally wrong with our genes that makes us cause malice, since not all human beings are evil

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: Anyone would not be capable of starting a war or dropping a bomb over Hiroshima

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: I believe that a majority of all people would object to most of the horrific deeds performed during the 20th century

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: This means that if malice can be in your genes it is not in all people's genes

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: Accordingly, it is not justifiable to argue that "It is no catastrophe if humanity is ruined in the long run, provided that humanity is replaced by a species with better prospects of living a happy and peaceful life"2 as Tännsjö does

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: There is also a possibility that evil is something you acquire from society but this is something that Tännsjö not once considers in his article

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: Neither in this case would it be possible to use the evil deeds performed by some people as an argument in favour of changing the whole human race genetically

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: Since if malice is something you acquire, not inherit, a change of society is needed to extinguish it, not a manipulation of our genes

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: Next I will discuss what the creation of a better human being could involve

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: Tännsjö writes in his article that genetic engineering might be dangerous for the development of society and that this is the most important argument against the science

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: He tries to refute this argument by saying that as long as there are no politiclly established ideals for humans there is no danger that the society becomes elitist

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: But this arguing is not convincing

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: There will always be people who choose or are forced to avoid the manipulation of their children's genes for different reasons

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: One reason is poverty

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: A majority of the world's population lives in poverty and they would not be able to utilise the science for economic reasons

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: There will also be people who object to genetic engineering, at least from the beginning

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: Tännsjö argues that we should follow our instinct considering this question and there are many people whose instinct would tell them to be careful and think twice about this

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: People with no manipulated genes will form a second class of the human race and we will get an elitist society

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: My third, main argument against Tännsjö's article also deals with the individual choice

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: There is a problem with his arguing and we are reminded of it when reading the headline: "Let genetic engineering create better human beings"

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: The problem lies within the word better

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: Who should decide what good qualities in a human being are? Tännsjö argues that every individual should decide what qualities their children should have

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: He has a belief in the individual and argues that no parent would choose to give their child bad qualities

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: But this is contradictory to his assumption that we have malice in our genes

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: If it were true, would it not be possible that we gave our children evil genes? We all perceive the world in different ways and would consider good qualities diversely

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: The only way to stop people from making monsters would be to decide what the ideal is or at least is not, and who should do that? Not the state according to Tännsjö since then there is a risk of an elitist society

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: Finally I want to answer the question Tännsjö asked in his article: "Should we not let genetic engineering create a better human being?"

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: The answer is no and the arguments in favour of this is what I have presented in my essay

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: There is no proof that malice is in our genes, there is a risk that we would get an elitist society and the individual choice of what are good qualities in a person can result in the making of monsters and then even more malice in our world

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: "Should we not create a better human being?" The answer is yes, but not through changes of our genes but instead through changes of our society

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: Summary of "Let Genetic Engineering Create Better Human Beings" Torbjörn Tännsjö claims that there must be something wrong with the biological nature of the human race, since human beings have caused so much evil during the 20th century

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: Therefore, he argues, we should create a better human being by using genetic engineering

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: The natural development from today will start with genetic vaccines for common diseases and then continue with using the science in a greater extent

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: Parents will for instant have the possibility to choose what aptitudes and personality qualities their children should develop

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: Furthermore Tännsjö argues that we should not try to stop this development since there are no convincing argument to do so

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: As long as all individuals are free to decide what they want for their children there will be no problems

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: Reference: Tännsjö, Torbjörn

title: Genetic Engineering - Develop or Stop?
text: "Låt gentekniken skapa bättre människor"

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: Sverker Åström, the former Secretary of Cabinet, believes that it is time to modernize the Swedish security policy by abandoning our policy of neutrality

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: This policy involves that Sweden would be military non-aligned in case of an international crisis or war in the immediate vicinity of the nation

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: The international situation has changed, it has never been as favorable as now, and such a war will not have to be feared within the next 10-15 years

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: To consider it as our main task to prepare ourselves for such a situation is absurd

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: Further on, Åström gives three different examples where Sweden can not be neutral: war between EU members, which he says is out of the question, war between an EU member and a non-EU member which he deems as is highly unlikely, and finally war between two non-EU members, where he considers it to be out of the question that Sweden declares itself as neutral

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: He states that the main purpose of our neutrality is now obsolete

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: The security policy of the Swedish government was accepted by the parliament in 1992 and is practically identical with the policy that was used during the cold war

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: The main purpose with this is, and has always been, to minimize the risk of Sweden being forced into a great war in Europe

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: My opinion is that it is these alliances in the world that increase the risk of war in a greater scale, since a lot of countries automatically get involved

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: Åstöm argues that there is no reason for Sweden to remain neutral in the world of today

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: In this essay, I will argue that Sweden should keep its neutrality and for this, I present three main reasons

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: Firstly, the purpose of EU is not the same today as it was in the 50s, that is, to guarantee peace

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: Secondly, a European alliance might not have the power to affect as much as one would hope

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: Thirdly, by remaining neutral, Sweden does not give up the possibility to affect the world either through the UN or by forming an opinion

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: Åström claims that a war situation between two EU members is impossible

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: He builds this argument on the fact that the main purpose with EU is to make war situations between the members of the union impossible

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: This was true in 1951, when the European coal and steel union was founded between the war-ravaged countries of France, West-Germany, Belgium, the Netherlands, Luxembourg and Italy (Vad Varje Svensk Bör Veta, 1995)

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: Coal and steel were extremely important resources in those days but has not the same significance today

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: So, the initial peace thought seems to have gotten lost, or at least been placed in the periphery, somewhere along the way

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: This means no absolute guarantee for peace in a more distant future and no reason to let go of the neutrality

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: In addition to this, Jörg Haider's successful election in Austria indicates that the stability in Europe may be easier lost than we think, which would also be a strong reason to keep the neutrality

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: The second argument I will discuss is that Åström thinks that a war situation between an EU state and a non-EU state is possible but highly unlikely

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: The counter reactions from EU would be too strong if a non-EU state were to threaten a member of EU

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: The example he gives as the non-EU state is Russia, which is a very interesting example

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: With the United States as the leading member, NATO can easily be considered more powerful than any military alliance in Europe

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: Still, this has not prevented Russia from invading Tjetjenia (I admit that it is not proved that Russian forces committed war crimes but the evidence found so far indicates that) and if potentially invading countries consider the risk of NATO, or the UN for that matter, interfering as small, then the risk of a combined European force to interfere must be negligible

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: Lastly, Åström discusses the case of war between two non-EU members

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: He considers it out of the question that Sweden can be neutral and believes instead that Sweden will protect its own national interests as far as possible, in consultation with the EU

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: Yet, it is important to understand that neutrality does not mean to avoid forming an opinion concerning international affairs

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: Being neutral, Sweden can still condemn actions of other states, recognize new states and even send peacekeeping forces abroad, through the UN

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: Of course, Åström adds that if Sweden was to join a military alliance, the fact remains that all states have the right to refrain from interfering, even if the rest of the union will

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: However, no aligned state would gain credibility if it never was to contribute with any assistance when needed, so instead of align itself, risking to lose credibility, Sweden should remain non-aligned

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: As we can see, the best thing for Sweden would be to remain neutral

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: This because the fact that Europe has changed and peace-keeping is now in the periphery and also because it is not clear at the moment what a combined European force would be to reckon with

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: Besides, neutrality does not mean silence in every international issue, all countries must be allowed to form an opinion, as long as the interference is left to the UN

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: In short, neutrality is something good, unique and, as far as Sweden is concerned, to recommend for quite some time in the future

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: Sources: Vad Varje Svensk Bör Veta

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
text: 1995: Bonnier Alba AB, Borås Åström, Sverker

title: Swedish neutrality-necessary or obsolete?
